title: Luffy Carries Oden’s Will Forward
description: On pages 34–35, this part focuses on Unknown person #33, Unknown person #34 as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Never thought I'd get to work with Dragon Salmon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A certain gutterminded cook's dirty thoughts might've gotten all over my sword.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SCUze ME?! Who's gonna give any of our precious salt to you, huh? Not me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you just swish it around in the ocean instead? Plenty of salt in that!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 12 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
